Introduction

DiData api doc

Base URL: https://pilot.swissdidata.com/jupiter 
This documentation aims to provide all the information you need to work with our API.

As you scroll, you'll see code examples for working with the API in different programming languages in the dark area to the right (or as part of the content on mobile).
You can switch the language used with the tabs at the top right (or from the nav menu at the top left on mobile).

Authenticating requests

To authenticate requests, include an Authorization header with the value "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}".

All authenticated endpoints are marked with a requires authentication badge in the documentation below.

AccessRights\Permission

List permissions

requires authentication

Example request:

Example response (200, success):


[
    {
        "code": "access_to_sensitive_fields",
        "description": "Access to sensitive fields",
        "groups": [
            "Fields",
            "DataView",
            "Forms"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "manage_all_projects",
        "description": "Manage all projects",
        "groups": [
            "Projects"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "create_field",
        "description": "Create field",
        "groups": [
            "Fields",
            "Forms"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "edit_field",
        "description": "Edit field",
        "groups": [
            "Fields"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "delete_field",
        "description": "Delete field",
        "groups": [
            "Fields"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "import_fields",
        "description": "Batch import of fields",
        "groups": [
            "Fields"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "edit_field_dynamic_tooltip",
        "description": "Edit field dynamic tooltip",
        "groups": [
            "Fields"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "create_entitytype",
        "description": "Create entity type",
        "groups": [
            "Entity types"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "edit_entitytype",
        "description": "Edit entity type",
        "groups": [
            "Entity types"
        ]
    },
    {
        "code": "delete_entitytype",
        "description": "Delete entity type",
        "groups": [
            "Entity types"
        ]
    }
]
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Accept

AccessRights\Project

List projects

requires authentication

show all projects (without users)

Example request:

Example response (200, success):


[
    {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Medic",
        "icon": {
            "code": "ezcze",
            "color": "#000000"
        },
        "description": null,
        "parent_project_id": 1,
        "created_at": "2020-05-05 10:00:00",
        "updated_at": "2020-05-05 10:00:00"
    },
    {
        "id": 2,
        "name": "Asa Turner",
        "description": "Ab accusamus qui voluptates et vitae sit consequatur sunt. Dolorum quaerat saepe itaque rerum. Fuga ullam maxime corrupti modi aut. Quia blanditiis voluptatum est veniam delectus quas perspiciatis.",
        "icon": {
            "code": "cezcez",
            "color": "#000000"
        },
        "parent_project_id": null,
        "created_at": "2023-01-08T13:40:52.480000Z",
        "updated_at": "2023-01-08T13:40:52.480000Z",
        "userlanguage_id": null
    }
]

GET api/access-rights/projects

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Create project

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "name": "architecto",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "icon": {
        "code": "rocket",
        "color": "#000000"
    },
    "parent_project_id": 1
}

Example response (201, success):


{
    "description": null,
    "icon": {
         "code": null,
         "color": null
    },
    "name": "Project",
    "parent_project_id": 1,
    "created_at": "2021-02-21 10:05:49.929",
    "updated_at": "2021-02-21 10:05:49.929"
    "id": 1,
}

Request   

POST api/access-rights/projects

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

(unique) Example: architecto

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

icon   object  optional    
code   string  optional    

(required_unless:icon,null). Example: rocket

color   string  optional    

. Example: #000000

parent_project_id   integer  optional    

The project id. Example: 1

Update project

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "name": "architecto",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "icon": {
        "code": "rocket",
        "color": "#000000"
    },
    "parent_project_id": 1
}

Example response (204, success):

Empty response

Didata-Project-Id

project   integer     

The project id. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

(unique) Example: architecto

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

icon   object  optional    
code   string  optional    

(required_unless:icon,null). Example: rocket

color   string  optional    

. Example: #000000

parent_project_id   integer  optional    

The project id. Example: 1

[

        "id": 40,

        "old_values": [],
        "new_values": {

Authorization

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: architecto

action_id   integer     

Example: 16

type   string     

(in:create_entity,update_entity,delete_entity,assign_entity_to_projects,attach_entity_to_study,2D_view,route_call,clone_entity,print_label,send_email,generate_pdf_report,excel_import,excel_export,excel_export). Example: create_entity

resource_id   integer  optional    

(required_if:type,create_entity,update_entity,clone_entity,route_call,print_label) Example: 16

auto_execution   boolean  optional    

Example: false

keep_ui_after_execution   boolean     

Example: false

apply_changes_for_remaining_entities   boolean     

Example: false

display_apply_changes_for_remaining_entities   boolean     

Example: false

meta_data   object  optional    
nb_entities   integer  optional    

(required_if:type,create_entity,clone_entity) Example: 16

collective_submission   boolean  optional    

(required_if:type,create_entity,update_entity) Example: false

nb_records_per_batch   integer  optional    

(required_if:type,create_entity,update_entity|collective_submission,true) Example: 5

email_field_id   integer  optional    

(required_if:type,send_email) Example: 16

email_template   string  optional    

(required_if:type,send_email,generate_pdf_report-send_email) Example: architecto

output_type   string  optional    

(required_if:type,generate_pdf_report|in:download,send_email). Example: send_email

pdf_password   boolean  optional    

(present_if:type,generate_pdf_report) Example: false

pdf_size   string  optional    

(required_if:type,generate_pdf_report). Example: a4

pdf_orientation   string  optional    

(required_if:type,generate_pdf_report). Example: portrait

template_source   string  optional    

(required_if:type,generate_pdf_report|in:field,template). Example: template

pdf_template   string  optional    

(required_if:template_source,generate_pdf_report) Example: architecto

field_id   integer  optional    

Only rich text fields are accepted (required_if:template_source,field) Example: 16

php_script   string  optional    

Has access to $entity variable and must return an array (required_if:type,generate_pdf_report). Example: return $entity;

config   object  optional    

(required_if:type,excel_import).
mode   string  optional    

(required_if:type,excel_import|in:create,update) Example: architecto

default_values   object  optional    

(required_if:type,excel_import).

Example: 16

Create choice category

requires authentication

Create a new Choice Category and its choices

Example request:
{
    "name": "architecto",
    "sort_by_value": false,
    "scalable_choices": false,
    "choices": [
        {
            "value": "architecto",
            "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
            "custom_id": 16,
            "icon": "architecto",
            "color": "architecto",
            "groups": [
                "architecto"
            ]
        }

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

CustomView

Create customviews

requires authentication

Create a new Custom View with all its columns and filters |-> input : list of filters and culmns |-> output : custom view created with all columns and filters

Example request:
{
    "name": "architecto",
    "entitytype_id": 16,
    "selected_entities": [
        16
    ],
    "filters": {
        "type": "bracket",
        "operationCode": "&&",
        "conditions": [
            {
                "type": "condition",
                "operationCode": "!=",
                "operand": 7,
                "value": "125"
            }
        ]
    },
    "columns": [
        {
            "field_id": 16,
            "width": 4326.41688,
            "pinned": "left"
        }
    ],
    "highlight": [
        {
            "highlighted_fields_ids": [
                16
            ],
            "filters": {
                "type": "bracket",
                "operationCode": "&&",
                "conditions": [
                    {
                        "type": "condition",
                        "operationCode": "!=",
                        "operand": 7,
                        "value": "125"
                    }
                ]
            },
            "background_color": "000000",
            "text_color": "ffffff",
            "icon": "architecto",
            "name": "architecto"
        }
    ],
    "fixed_choice_as": "value",
    "rows_per_page": 50,
    "icon": {
        "code": "rocket",
        "color": "#000000"
    },
    "is_scan_mode": false,
    "scan_by": 16
}

Example response (200, success):

            {
                "type": "condition",

            }

        "name" : "free storages",

        ],

POST api/customviews

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: architecto

entitytype_id   integer     

Example: 16

selected_entities   integer[]     
filters   object  optional    
columns   object[]  optional    
field_id   integer     

Example: 16

width   number  optional    

Example: 4326.41688

pinned   string  optional    

(in:left,right). Example: left

highlight   object[]  optional    

(size between 3 and 5)
highlighted_fields_ids   integer[]     
filters   object  optional    
type   string  optional    

Example: bracket

background_color   string  optional    

Example: 000000

text_color   string  optional    

Example: ffffff

icon   string  optional    

Example: architecto

name   string  optional    

Example: architecto

fixed_choice_as   string  optional    

(in:custom_id,value) Example: value

params   object  optional    
sort   object[]  optional    

List of sort_by.

rows_per_page   integer  optional    

Null implies all rows (in:50,1000,3000) Example: 50

icon   object  optional    
code   string  optional    

(required_unless:icon,null). Example: rocket

color   string  optional    

. Example: #000000

is_scan_mode   boolean  optional    

Example: false

scan_by   integer  optional    

field id Example: 16

    ],

                16
            ],

                        "value": "125"
                    }
                ]
            },

            "name": "architecto"
        }
    ],
    "fixed_choice_as": "value",
    "rows_per_page": 50,
    "icon": {
        "code": "rocket",

Request   

PUT api/customviews/{access_custom_view}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

URL Parameters

access_custom_view   integer     

Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Example: architecto

selected_entities   integer[]     
filters   object  optional    
columns   object[]  optional    
field_id   integer     

Example: 16

width   number  optional    

Example: 4326.41688

pinned   string  optional    

(in:left,right). Example: left

highlight   object[]  optional    

(size between 3 and 5)
highlighted_fields_ids   integer[]     
filters   object  optional    
type   string  optional    

Example: bracket

background_color   string  optional    

Example: 000000

text_color   string  optional    

Example: ffffff

icon   string  optional    

Example: architecto

name   string  optional    

Example: architecto

params   object  optional    
sort   object[]  optional    

List of sort_by.

fixed_choice_as   string  optional    

(in:custom_id,value) Example: value

rows_per_page   integer  optional    

Null implies all rows (in:50,1000,3000) Example: 50

icon   object  optional    
code   string  optional    

(required_unless:icon,null). Example: rocket

color   string  optional    

. Example: #000000

is_scan_mode   boolean  optional    

Example: false

scan_by   integer  optional    

field id Example: 16

page   integer  optional    

(default 1 if by_page is selected) Example: 16

by_page   integer  optional    

Example: 16

search_value   string  optional    

Example: architecto

search_by   int|int[]  optional    

The field_id(s) to search by. Can be a single ID or an array of IDs.

entitytype_ids   integer[]  optional    
fields   string[]  optional    

Fields name to project (default null -> all fields are selected).

params   object  optional    
sort   object[]  optional    

List of sort_by.

count_only   boolean  optional    

Example: false

Example: architecto

(in:portrait,landscape) Example: portrait

Example: false

pdf_password   string  optional    

('required_if:enable_pdf_password,true') Example: architecto

cover   string  optional    

Example: architecto

header   string  optional    

Example: architecto

footer   string  optional    

Example: architecto

Batch create entities

requires authentication

Create new entities

Example request:
{
    "data": [
        {
            "entitytype_id": 5
        }
    ],
    "options": {
        "disable_warnings": false,
        "fixed_choice_value_key": "architecto",
        "shown_values": {
            "29": 7,
            "30": 7
        },
        "default_values": [
            {
                "field_id": 7,
                "default_value": {
                    "value": "sample-001",
                    "type": "static"
                }
            }
        ]
    },
    "async": false,
    "data_tracker": [],
    "chunking": {
        "enabled": false,
        "size": 16
    }
}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Example: 1

Body Parameters

data   object[]     

array of data entities to create.

options   object  optional    
disable_warnings   boolean  optional    

(not_present_if:async,false) Example: false

fixed_choice_value_key   string  optional    

(in:value,custom_id,id) Example: architecto

shown_values   object  optional    
default_values   string[]  optional    
async   boolean  optional    

default false Example: false

data_tracker   object  optional    

default {}, used to track/persist data in async mode

chunking   object  optional    

(required_if:async,true)
enabled   boolean  optional    

(required_if:async,true) Example: false

size   integer  optional    

(required_if:chunking.enabled,true) Example: 16

requires authentication

{
    "data": [

    "save_changes": false,
    "data_tracker": [

        "entitytype_id": 16,
        "fixed_choice_value_key": "architecto",

            "29": 7,
            "30": 7
        },
        "default_values": [
            {
                "field_id": 7,
                "default_value": {
                    "value": "sample-001",
                    "type": "static"

        "enabled": false,
        "size": 16

}

chunking   object  optional    

(required_if:async,true)

Request   

POST api/fields

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

fieldtype   string     

should be one of the supported field types Example: architecto

type   string     

If the fieldtype is UNIQUE, should be one of the supported types Example: architecto

name   string     

(unique) Example: architecto

label   string     

Example: architecto

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

entityTypes_id   string[]  optional    

entityTypes ids to be linked with the field

read_only   boolean  optional    

if true the field is in read only mode Example: false

lock_after_entry   boolean  optional    

if true the field value will be filled only once Example: false

sensitive   boolean  optional    

if true the field is a sensitive field Example: false

datatype   string     

if the fieldtype is BASIC should be one of the supported datatypes Example: architecto

choicecategory_id   integer     

if the fieldtype is FIXED Example: 16

multiple   boolean     

if the fieldtype is FIXED or FOREIGN Example: false

target_entitytype_id   integer     

if the fieldtype is FOREIGN, the id of the target entitytype Example: 16

shown_field_id   integer  optional    

if the fieldtype is FOREIGN, the id of the shown field Example: 16

prefix   string  optional    

if the fieldtype is UNIQUE Example: architecto

tooltip_type   string  optional    

require Example: architecto

suffix   string  optional    

if the fieldtype is UNIQUE Example: architecto

displayabletype   string     

if the fieldtype is STATIC, should be HEADER, LABEL or IMAGE Example: architecto

value   string  optional    

if the fieldtype is STATIC Example: architecto

Update field

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "label": "architecto",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "entityTypes_id": [
        "architecto"
    ],
    "read_only": false,
    "lock_after_entry": false,
    "sensitive": false,

    "multiple": false,
    "target_entitytype_id": 16,
    "shown_field_id": 16,

    "tooltip_type": "architecto",

}

Search entities by foreign field

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "entities_ids": [
        16
    ],
    "search_value": "architecto",
    "page": 16,
    "by_page": 16,
    "filters": {
        "type": "bracket",
        "operationCode": "&&",
        "conditions": [
            {
                "type": "condition",
                "operationCode": "!=",
                "operand": 7,
                "value": "125"
            }
        ]
    }
}

Authorization

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

URL Parameters

Example: 1

form   integer     

The ID of the form. Example: 16

Body Parameters

displayable_form_contents   string[]     

The layout configuration for top-level displayable contents.
id   integer     

The ID of the displayable content. Example: 4

position_row   integer     

The row position. Example: 2

position_col   integer     

The column position. Example: 1

width   integer     

The width of the content (1–12). Example: 4

height   integer     

The height of the content (min 1). Example: 1

children   string[]     

The child resources of the form.
id   integer     

The ID of the child resource. Example: 1

displayable_form_contents   string[]     

Layout configuration for each child.
id   integer     

The ID of the displayable content for the child. Example: 6

position_row   integer     

The row position. Example: 1

position_col   integer     

The column position. Example: 1

width   integer     

The width of the content (1–12). Example: 1

height   integer     

The height of the content (min 1). Example: 1

Timestamp. Example: 1674040768

Body Parameters

data   required  optional    

object The data for the main form Example: {"data": {"BARCODE": "br00-1","NAME": "Fr001"}}

children   object[]     

(required_if:the form has children)The child forms Example {"children": [ {"child_form_id": 2,"data": [{"BARCODE": "FRR" }]}]}
child_form_id   integer     

The ID of the child form Example: 16

data   object[]  optional    

The data for the child form.

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

file   file     

file to upload (can be:CSV or XLSX) Example: /tmp/phpAhO5yU

header_line   integer  optional    

Example: 1

ignore_columns   string[]  optional    

A list telling which columns to ignore

field_value_key   string  optional    

default to name (in:name,label). Example: name

only_columns   string[]  optional    

A list telling which columns to keep

columns_mapping   object  optional    

Mapping key to value.

Example: application/json

Example: 1

Body Parameters

resources   object     

(in:actions, calculations, choice_categories, configurations, custom_views, dashboards, entity_types, favorites, fields, forms, icons, plugins, printers, projects, roles, rules, statistics,translations, user_routes, users, workflows)
actions   object  optional    

Optional - Actions to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Action IDs to export.

calculations   object  optional    

Optional - Calculations to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Calculation IDs to export.

choice_categories   object  optional    

Optional - Choice categories to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Choice category IDs to export.

configurations   object  optional    

Optional - Configurations to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Configuration IDs to export.

custom_views   object  optional    

Optional - Custom views to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Custom view IDs to export.

dashboards   object  optional    

Optional - Dashboards to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Dashboard IDs to export.

entity_types   object  optional    

Optional - Entity types to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Entity type IDs to export.

favorites   object  optional    

Optional - Favorites to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Favorite IDs to export.

fields   object  optional    

Optional - Fields to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Field IDs to export.

forms   object  optional    

Optional - Forms to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Form IDs to export.

icons   object  optional    

Optional - Icons to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Icon IDs to export.

plugins   object  optional    

Optional - Plugins to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Plugin IDs to export.

printers   object  optional    

Optional - Printers to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Printer IDs to export.

projects   object  optional    

Optional - Projects to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Project IDs to export.

roles   object  optional    

Optional - Roles to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Role IDs to export.

rules   object  optional    

Optional - Rules to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Rule IDs to export.

statistics   object  optional    

Optional - Statistics to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Statistic IDs to export.

translations   object  optional    

Optional - Translations to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Translation IDs to export.

user_routes   object  optional    

Optional - User routes to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - User route IDs to export.

users   object  optional    

Optional - Users to export.

user_languages   object  optional    
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - User language IDs to export.

workflows   object  optional    

Optional - Workflows to export.
ids   integer[]  optional    

Optional - Workflow IDs to export.

Import resources.

requires authentication

The import must use the same format as the exported file. It supports the same resources as export: actions, calculations, choice_categories, configurations, custom_views, dashboards, entity_types, favorites, fields, forms, icons, plugins, printers, projects, roles, rules, statistics, translations, user_routes, user_languages, workflows.

{
    "params": []
}

Example response (204, success):

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

URL Parameters

monitoring_event_name   string     

The external monitoring event name. Example: access_to_module

Body Parameters

module   string     

(required_if:monitoring_event_name,access_to_module|in:moduleNames). Example: actions

from   string  optional    

(different:module|in:moduleNames). Example: workflows

modules   object     

(required_if:monitoring_event_name,access_to_split_screen).

Authorization

Content-Type

Accept        

Example: application/json

Example: 1

Body Parameters

content   string     

Example: architecto

name   string     

Example: architecto

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

channels   string[]     
users_id   integer[]  optional    

Array of users IDs (nullable)

check_per   string     

(in:minute,hour,day,week). Example: week

execute_next_minute   boolean  optional    

Example: false

check_event_at_params   object     
day   integer  optional    

(required_if:check_per,week|min:1|max:7), 1 for Monday. Example: 1

time   string  optional    

Time string (date_format:H:i). Example: 06:59

every   integer  optional    

(required_if:check_per,minute|min:1|max:59). Example: 20

POST api/plugins

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

Name of the plugin. Example: architecto

template   string     

Html code. Example: architecto

js   string     

Javascript code. Example: architecto

type   string     

Type of the plugin (in:popup,module). Example: popup

priority   integer  optional    

Example: 16

state   string     

State of the plugin (in:test,production). Example: production

is_enable   boolean     

The status of the plugin Example: false

roles   integer[]  optional    

List of the roles.

routes   object[]     
icon   object     
code   string     

. Example: rocket

color   string  optional    

. Example: #000000

meta_data   object     
module_name   string  optional    

(required_if:type,module) Example: architecto

display_on   string[]  optional    

(required_if:type,popup).

Update plugin

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "name": "architecto",
    "template": "architecto",
    "js": "architecto",
    "type": "popup",
    "priority": 16,
    "state": "production",
    "is_enable": false,
    "roles": [
        16
    ],

            "code": "return true;"
        }
    ],

        "color": "#000000"
    },

PUT api/plugins/{access_plugin}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

URL Parameters

access_plugin   integer     

Example: 3642559

plugin   integer     

The ID of plugin. Example: 16

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Name of the plugin. Example: architecto

template   string  optional    

Html code. Example: architecto

js   string  optional    

Javascript code. Example: architecto

type   string  optional    

Type of the plugin (in:popup,module). Example: popup

priority   integer  optional    

Example: 16

state   string  optional    

State of the plugin (in:test,production). Example: production

is_enable   boolean  optional    

The status of the plugin Example: false

roles   integer[]  optional    

List of the roles.

routes   object[]     
icon   object  optional    
code   string  optional    

(required_unless:icon,null). Example: rocket

color   string  optional    

. Example: #000000

meta_data   object     
module_name   string  optional    

(required_if:type,module) Example: architecto

display_on   string[]  optional    

(required_if:type,popup).

Update plugin status

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "is_enable": false
}

Example response (204, success):

Empty response
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Printers\PrinterCompiler

requires authentication

{
    "data": {
        "id": 12,
        "created_at": 234
    },
    "copies": 16
}

{
    "compiled_template": "SIZE 350 dot,150 dot\nGAP 0 dot,0 dot\nDIRECTION 1\nCLS\nTEXT 0,0,\"1\",0,1,1,\"text\" \nBARCODE 0,100,\"128\",120,2,0,2,2,\"barcode\" \nQRCODE 0,250,M,2,A,0,\"qr code\" \nPRINT 1"
}

        "id": 1,

        "name": "generate text label",

            "height": 200,
            "width": 350,
            "items": [
                {
                    "type": "TEXT",
                    "position-x": 0,
                    "position-y": 0,
                    "input_type": "text_code"
                    "details": {
                        "label": "text 1",
                        "value": "text",
                        "size": 2,
                        "rotate": 90
                    }
                },

                    "type": "BARCODE",

                        "rotate": 90
                    }
                },
                {
                    "type": "QRCODE",
                    "position-x": 0,
                    "position-y": 0,
                    "input_type": "field"
                    "details": {
                        "value": 7,
                        "rotate": 90,
                        "size": 10
                    }
                }
            ]
        },

Accept

Example: 1

Create printer template

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "name": "architecto",
    "printer_id": 16,
    "template": {
        "width": 16,
        "height": 16,
        "items": [
            {
                "type": "TEXT",
                "position-x": 16,
                "position-y": 16,
                "input_type": "text_code",
                "details": {
                    "value": "architecto",
                    "rotate": 0,
                    "size": 1,
                    "height": 16,
                    "show_line": false,
                    "code": 0,
                    "label": "Text 1"
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}

Request   

POST api/printers/templates

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: architecto

printer_id   integer     

Example: 16

template   object     
width   integer  optional    

Example: 16

height   integer     

Example: 16

items   object[]  optional    
type   string     

(in:TEXT,BARCODE,QRCODE,DATA_MATRIX). Example: TEXT

position-x   integer     

(min:0) Example: 16

position-y   integer     

(min:0) Example: 16

input_type   string     

(in:text_code, field). Example: text_code

details   object     
value   string     

Example: architecto

rotate   integer     

(in:0,90,180,270). Example: 0

size   integer  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,BARCODE,QRCODE|between:1,10). Example: 1

height   integer  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,BARCODE|min:0) Example: 16

show_line   boolean  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,BARCODE) Example: false

code   integer  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,BARCODE). Example: 0

label   string  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,TEXT). Example: Text 1

Request   

PUT api/printers/templates/{access_printer_template}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

URL Parameters

access_printer_template   integer     

The ID of the printer template to delete Example: 16

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Example: architecto

printer_id   integer  optional    

Example: 16

template   object  optional    
width   integer  optional    

Example: 16

height   integer  optional    

Example: 16

items   object[]  optional    
type   string  optional    

(in:TEXT,BARCODE,QRCODE,DATA_MATRIX). Example: TEXT

position-x   integer  optional    

(min:0) Example: 16

position-y   integer  optional    

(min:0) Example: 16

input_type   string     

(in:text_code, field). Example: text_code

details   object  optional    
value   string  optional    

Example: architecto

rotate   integer  optional    

(in:0,90,180,270). Example: 0

size   integer  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,BARCODE,QRCODE|between:1,10). Example: 1

height   integer  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,BARCODE|min:0) Example: 16

show_line   boolean  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,BARCODE) Example: false

code   integer  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,BARCODE). Example: 0

label   string  optional    

(required_if:template.items.*.type,TEXT). Example: Text 1

Delete printer template

Request   

COPY api/statistics/{access_statistics}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

URL Parameters

access_statistics   integer     

ID of the statistics Example: 16

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: architecto

create statistics

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "name": "architecto",
    "entitytype_id": 16,
    "group_by": [
        {
            "field_id": 12,
            "position": 1
        }
    ],
    "filters": {
        "type": "bracket",
        "operationCode": "&&",
        "conditions": [
            {
                "type": "condition",
                "operationCode": "!=",
                "operand": 7,
                "value": "125"
            }
        ]
    }
}

Example response (201, success):


{
    "name": "Hailie.Prohaska",
    "entitytype_id": 1,
    "updated_at": "2023-06-22T07:55:47.000000Z",

    "id": 5,
    "group_by": [
        {
            "field_id": 12,
            "format": "week",
            "position": 1
        },
        {
            "field_id": 2,
            "format": null,
            "position": 2
        }
    ]
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

Name of the task. Example: architecto

resource_type   string     

Type of the ressource(in:entity,entityType). Example: entity

execution_stage   string     

Execution stage (in:before,after). Example: before

php_script   string     

The task to execute. Example: $this->message = 'Error message'; $this->error = true;

active   boolean     

The status of the task on or off. Example: false

    "execution_stage": "before",

}

Request   

POST api/user-routes

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

Name of the rule. Example: validate

type   string  optional    

Type of the route (GET, POST) default GET. Example: GET

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

code   string     

The code to execute. Example: return true;

is_enabled   boolean     

The status of the route Example: false

is_public   boolean  optional    

(default to false). Example: false

sub_path   string  optional    

Example: custom-validation

users_access_list   integer[]  optional    

Array of users ids (null means all users, empty means none).

Update user route

requires authentication

Example request:
{
    "name": "validate",
    "type": "GET",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "code": "return true;",
    "is_enabled": false,
    "is_public": false,
    "sub_path": "custom-validation",
    "users_access_list": [
        1,
        2
    ]
}

Example response (204, success):

Example: 1

Body Parameters

(unique) Example: architecto

password   string  optional    

(required if is_ldap_user is false). Example: password

password_confirmation   string  optional    

(required if is_ldap_user is false). Example: password

email   string  optional    

(Unique), Example: doe@exmple.com

default_role_id   integer  optional    

Example: 1

user_language_id   integer  optional    

Example: 1

use_2fa   boolean  optional    

Example: false

user_type   string     

Example: ldap, database, keycloak

change_password_on_next_login   boolean  optional    

Example: false

first_name   string  optional    

Example: jon

last_name   string  optional    

Example: doe

active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

locked   boolean  optional    

Example: true

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Didata-Project-Id        

Example: 1

URL Parameters

access_workflow   integer     

Workflow ID Example: 16

Body Parameters

nodes   object[]     

array of all workflow nodes
id   integer     

Node id Example: 16

name   string     

Node name Example: architecto

is_starter   boolean     

Example: false

state_id   integer     

choice id Example: 16

layout   object  optional    

layout details.
position_x   number     

Node position x Example: 4326.41688

position_y   number     

Node position y Example: 4326.41688

search_value   string  optional    

Example: architecto

selected_entities   integer[]  optional    
fixed_choice_as   string  optional    

(in:custom_id,value) Example: value

columns   object[]     

List of columns details.
field_id   integer     

field id Example: 16

width   number     

Example: 4326.41688

filters   object  optional    
highlight   object[]  optional    
highlighted_fields_ids   integer[]     
filters   object  optional    
type   string  optional    

Example: bracket

background_color   required  optional    

string Example: 000000

Example: ffffff

icon   string  optional    

Example: architecto

name   string  optional    

Example: architecto

is_scan_mode   boolean  optional    

Example: false

scan_by   integer  optional    

field id Example: 16

sort   object[]  optional    

List of sort_by.

second_grid   object  optional    

Grid

Example: false

scan_by   integer  optional    

field id Example: 16

List of columns details.

sort   object[]  optional    

List of sort_by.

(in:custom_id,value). Example: value

Node id Example: 16

actions   object[]  optional    

List of actions.

(in:action,plugin). Example: action

action_id   integer     

Example: 16

identify_entities_by   integer  optional

(default:true) Example: false
